title: Device Settings - Settings UI: UI, animation
scenario: Verify the Device Settings page UI for a headset (HS) displays collapsible tabs with sliding animation and matches Figma design.
steps: Open the Device Settings page for the headset (HS).
Observe that tabs are displayed and collapsed by default.
Click on any tab to open it.
Confirm the tab expands with a proper sliding animation.
Click on the same tab again to close it.
Confirm the tab collapses with a proper sliding animation.
Verify all settings UI elements (text, position, lines, etc.) match the Figma design.
expected: Tabs are displayed and collapsed by default. Clicking a tab expands it with a smooth sliding animation. Clicking again collapses it. All UI elements match the Figma design.
